title: eriopappus glandulosus
intro: Eriopappus glandulosus, also known as the sticky woollyweed or glandular sticky everlasting, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Eriopappus glandulosus include its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as aiding in the treatment of skin conditions, wound healing, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Eriopappus glandulosus can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in traditional medicine for its purported health benefits.
